w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Enthusiastic and detail-oriented fresher with a keen interest in technology, aspiring to begin a career in a reputed tech company. Possesses intermediate proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word, with a strong ability to manage data, create well-structured documents, and support office operations efficiently. Known for a methodical approach to problem-solving and a quick learning attitude

Enthusiastic and detail-oriented fresher with a keen interest in technology, aspiring to begin a career in a reputed tech company. Possesses intermediate proficiency in Microsoft Excel and Word, with a strong ability to manage data, create well-structured documents, and support office operations efficiently. Known for a methodical approach to problem-solving and a quick learning attitude
Microsoft Excel: Intermediate knowledge of formulas, data organization, analysis, and chart creation.
Microsoft Word: Skilled in document formatting, editing, and professional report generation.
Reading: Enjoys exploring books and articles on diverse topics to expand knowledge.
Singing: Passionate about singing, contributing to creativity and relaxation.
Excellent communication skills and strong work ethic.
Eager to adapt and grow in dynamic team environments.
Committed to continuous learning and self-improvement.
Ready to contribute positively to organizational goals with a fresh perspective and a dedication to quality work in technology-driven settings.
Microsoft Excel: Intermediate knowledge of formulas, data organization, analysis, and chart creation.
Microsoft Word: Skilled in document formatting, editing, and professional report generation.
Reading: Enjoys exploring books and articles on diverse topics to expand knowledge.
Singing: Passionate about singing, contributing to creativity and relaxation.
Excellent communication skills and strong work ethic.
Eager to adapt and grow in dynamic team environments.
Committed to continuous learning and self-improvement.
Ready to contribute positively to organizational goals with a fresh perspective and a dedication to quality work in technology-driven settings.
18 Months of computer coaching in (National computer center)
